channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Micky Dolenz @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-07-20 03:00 — Micky Dolenz at Uptown Theatre Napa. J. Cole is a major hip-hop artist with a strong reputation for live performances, making this a highly anticipated event.

item.title: SLANDER @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-07-11 03:00 → 2026-07-12 03:00 — SLANDER at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. SLANDER is a popular electronic act known for their energetic shows, appealing to a large audience.

item.title: Joshua Slone @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-07-01 03:00 — Joshua Slone at The Fillmore. Holly Humberstone is an emerging indie artist with significant buzz and a compelling live presence.

item.title: Marcus King Band @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-08 03:00 — Marcus King Band at Fox Theater - Oakland. Marcus King Band is gaining traction with their blend of rock and blues, promising a captivating live experience.

item.title: Holly Humberstone @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-29 03:00 — Holly Humberstone at The Fillmore. Holly Humberstone's tour adds to the excitement with her rising star status in the indie scene.

item.title: Streetlight Manifesto @ The Regency Ballroom
item.description: 2026-07-14 03:00 — Streetlight Manifesto at The Regency Ballroom. Streetlight Manifesto is known for their high-energy ska performances, appealing to a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Jon Anderson @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-07-01 03:00 — Jon Anderson at San Jose Civic. Jon Anderson's collaboration with The Band Geeks offers a unique twist for fans of classic rock.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses is known for their atmospheric live shows, appealing to electronic and indie fans alike.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is celebrated for their engaging performances and eclectic sound.

item.title: Earlybirds Club @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-07-12 01:00 — Earlybirds Club at August Hall. Earlybirds Club presents a fresh indie sound that could resonate well with the local scene.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE's world tour adds an exciting K-pop element to the Bay Area music scene.

item.title: YOASOBI @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-15 03:00 — YOASOBI at Oakland Arena. YOASOBI's tour brings a unique Japanese pop experience to the Bay Area, attracting a diverse audience.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. David Byrne's tour promises an innovative live experience from a legendary artist.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band is known for their soulful performances, appealing to blues and rock fans.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's tour is likely to attract a laid-back crowd, perfect for the summer vibe.

item.title: Passion Pit @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-17 02:30 — Passion Pit at Fox Theater - Oakland. Social Distortion's tour appeals to fans of punk rock with a strong legacy.

item.title: LE SSERAFIM @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-09-24 02:30 — LE SSERAFIM at SAP Center at San Jose. LE SSERAFIM's tour brings a fresh K-pop experience to the Bay Area, appealing to a growing fanbase.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. Cavetown's tour is gaining traction among younger audiences with a heartfelt indie sound.
